overview: Computing science graduate with 5+ years industry (software testing & development) and research experience
A fast learner who is experienced in working in team-centric and fast-paced environments
Proficient in C/C++, Python, TypeScript & Swift, and experience with cloud computing services like Amazon Web Service (AWS) & Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
Proficient in data analysis frameworks, such as NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib & SciPy

positions.title: Clinical Research Project Assistant
description: Examined the association between high-level moderation to physical activities \& social networking and less fatigue \& depression among youth with multiple sclerosis, and assessed the technical considerations and practical applications of consumer-grade wearables (e.g., Fitbit, Apple Watch) in pediatric clinical trials

Developed and maintained ATOMIC, a native iOS application (using Swift and SwiftUI) designed to support youth with multiple sclerosis by providing access to health information and engagement tools as part of an international research intervention program

Integrated wearable and health data sources, including Fitbit, Apple Watch (using Apple CoreMotion, SensorKit and HealthKit), Firebase Realtime Database and REDCap, to automate real-time physical activity tracking within ATOMIC

Built and optimized a web-based data dashboard for clinical trials (using Next.js, Python and Firebase Cloud Functions) to enable real-time data analysis, visualization, and participant monitoring for coaching staff and researchers

positions.title: Research Software Developer
description: Worked as part of an agile software development team to create, maintain and optimize various software tools that support McMaster's researchers and research facilities, notable projects include The McMaster University Lab Information Management System (developed in PHP and MySQL), open-source bibliometric research tools (developed in Python and Jupyter Notebook)

Contributed to numerous open-source software projects that support research activities by triaging and patching issues, such as research data collection, data processing \& analysis and citation, notable projects include \href{https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp}{whisper.cpp}, \href{https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain}{LangChain} and \href{https://github.com/vsoch/citelang}{CiteLang}

Led training initiatives by developing workshop-style presentations and materials on topics in software engineering in a research context, such as technical project management, software containerization, web security (OWASP), web accessibility (WCAG and AODA) and generative artificial intelligence-driven research data management

Derived principles and practices of research data management to develop recommendations for research software management, promoting FAIR principles, open science, and research reproducibility, influencing best practices at both institutional and international levels

positions.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
description: Analyzed central mass density variations in galaxies during quenching, identifying correlations with black hole masses
Processed and visualized large-scale cosmological magnetohydrodynamical simulations (\href{https://www.tng-project.org/}{IllustrisTNG}) to study the compaction effect at the end of galaxy evolution
Executed high-performance computations scripts (developed in Python, NumPy, Matplotlib and Astropy) on a \href{https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Cedar}{SLURM-based HPC cluster}
Led outreach initiatives, presenting research findings to regional astronomy communities and academic audiences, fostering public engagement in astrophysics research

positions.title: Software Developer
description: Resolved over 100 software issues, collaborating with customer support to triage and troubleshoot field-reported bugs, improving system stability
Developed and optimized front-end UI components in Swift and Objective-C, enhancing responsiveness and user experience
Integrated business analytics tools while ensuring secure data transmission via SOAP and REST APIs, improving data insights and compliance

positions.title: Certification Engineer (Co-op)
description: Configured and optimized LTE and 5G mobile hotspot products to meet regulatory compliance standards across multiple carrier networks
Led issue triaging and debugging, collaborating with firmware, software and certification teams to troubleshoot customer-reported problems in a fast-paced agile environment
Developed and maintained automated tools to streamline workflow processes, data analysis, and testing for LTE Advanced Carrier Aggregation, improving testing efficiency
Implemented build scripts using Python, C\#, .NET, AT commands and Visual Basic, reducing manual intervention and enhancing deployment speed for certification testing

positions.title: Grant Writing and Research Committee Member
Actionable FAIR Research Software Guidelines Task Force

experience.title: Stable Matching Quantum Algorithm
description: Developed a quantum algorithm leveraging Grover’s search to solve the stable matching problem with $O(n\sqrt{n})$ complexity, significantly outperforming the classical Gale-Shapley algorithm ($O(n^2)$)
Designed and implemented search black boxes for all entities, optimizing quantum state representation and improving computational efficiency
Engineered a stability evaluation method to analyze all possible stable matches, achieving 75\% accuracy on the Qiskit Aer quantum computing simulator

experience.title: Variable Star Photometry
description: Developed an observation proposal detailing optimal target selection and telescope usage time calculations, contributing to an article with methodology, results and visual data representations

Processed and calibrated astronomical imaging data using Python and astrophysics libraries (e.g. \href{https://pypi.org/project/sep/}{SEP}) to correct for atmospheric extinction and cosmic rays, improving data accuracy
Analyzed luminosity periodicity in variable stars by applying statistical and computational techniques, identifying patterns relevant to astrophysical research
